alkylation reagent: alkylated in the dark with iodoacetamide (1200 nmol, 30 min, 25 °C)
alkylation concentration: alkylated in the dark with iodoacetamide (1200 nmol, 30 min, 25 °C)
collision energy: CID fragmentation at normalized collision energy of 25%
fractionation method: could be purified by gel filtration
fragmentation method: CID fragmentation at normalized collision energy of 25%
instrument: analyzed using an Orbitrap Fusion mass spectrometer
ionization type: coupled online with a 5600 triple TOF mass spectrometer (AB Sciex, Framingham, MA) through a nanospray III ion source (AB Sciex)
